summary: The diff implements substantial portions of all six requirements. Core infrastructure for SMC indicators, technical indicators, HMAC-SHA256 signing, credential storage, position polling, and the visual theme are all present. However, several specific acceptance criteria are not verifiable from the diff: funding rate and open interest display (REQ-1), chart zoom capability (REQ-1), a dedicated positions panel component with all required fields and alert animation (REQ-5), and a top-level dashboard layout file composing the multi-panel grid (REQ-6). The SMA 50/200 overlay on the candlestick chart is also absent from the visible CandlestickChart.tsx snippet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Funding rate and open interest are displayed per symbol in the market data dashboard
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows binanceFetch.ts handles 24hr ticker data but no fetch calls for /fapi/v1/fundingRate or /fapi/v1/openInterest endpoints are visible. No component displays funding rate or open interest fields.
CandlestickChart.tsx renders a canvas-based chart with timeframe selection but no zoom/pan interaction logic (mouse wheel, drag, pinch) is visible in the truncated file.

missing_requirements.requirement: SMA 50 and SMA 200 lines overlaid on the candlestick chart
missing_requirements.reason: CandlestickChart.tsx defines MA color constants only for EMA20, EMA50, EMA200 and Bollinger Bands. No SMA drawing code is visible in the truncated chart rendering section.

missing_requirements.requirement: A dedicated positions panel component showing each open position card with symbol, side, entry price, mark price, unrealized PnL (USDT and %), liquidation price, and leverage — with visual alert badge/animation for PnL exceeding threshold and last-updated timestamp
missing_requirements.reason: No PositionsPanel or PositionCard component is present in the diff. The positionAlerts.ts and useBinancePositions.ts hooks are implemented, but no UI component rendering position cards with all required fields and the alert animation is added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard layout with multi-panel grid: chart area (center), SMC signals panel (right), positions panel (bottom or side)
missing_requirements.reason: No top-level dashboard or layout page component composing the multi-panel grid is added in the diff. App.tsx is modified but the file summary only mentions tab navigation changes, not a new trading dashboard layout.
